problems_encountered.description: org/list tool returns 'unknown' as organization IDs instead of actual IDs (format: o-XXXXX). Cannot execute org/get without valid organization ID.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed - prerequisite org/list does not provide valid organization IDs
execution_notes: The org/list tool response shows 'id: unknown' for all organizations. The org/get tool requires a valid organization ID in format o-XXXXX per the schema. This appears to be a data exposure issue in the org/list tool implementation where actual IDs are masked or not retrieved from the API.
